reviews.review_description: Very fun, play every day. Burns about 20-30 calories per 2-3 minutes . Wish more short, mini sport games like this existed.

The speed of the ball and differing directions give a good enough workout without the extremely fast and annoying movement of red penalty cursors. There should be an ability to switch the red movement cursors off. The speed and direction of the balls give a great workout on their own. A far better penalty objective of the game would be to hit the ball to a specific target area from different ball angles. Still it's a great game, I just ignore the penalty red cursors.
Really great workout for me gets the blood pumping and although not much room is required it feels like a lot of movement is achieved....great.
The game is typical fitness app and has nothing mutual with tennis. It is very good for workout. Obstacles should be bigger and more visible. I love this game.

I've tried other tennis apps to workout and I felt that none of them really made me move. I think that this app has great potential. It makes you use both arms, get up and get down a lot. It's also friendly for small spaces and the music is great. I feel that it still has a lot of things to improve. It would be cool to pick the exercise according to the upper or lower body workout or to have the chance to select the favorite played songs. It still needs some things to make it more personalized. I will still use it for my daily workout!

This game is pretty fun. Although I do wish there were options to turn off obstacles. People who can not stand very well or at all would love this game but when you're hit by the obstacles you lose. If there was an option to remove those then this game would be amazing.
